Home/Professional mature-palm installation.

Verified field capability

Professional mature-palm installation.

The Facebook archive contains authentic evidence of machinery-assisted mature-palm positioning and installation. Every new site still requires its own assessment.

Discuss an installation →
EvidenceAuthentic company field media
MethodProject-specific assessment
Suitable forMature and large palms
Quote needsLocation, access, size and quantity

What buyers need to know

01

Why assessment matters

Large palms cannot be quoted responsibly from height alone. Ground conditions, access and equipment requirements change the plan.

  • Site photographs
  • Access measurements
  • Palm size and quantity
02

What the service covers

Final scope is confirmed in the quotation and may include handling, transportation, positioning and planting.

  • Lifting plan
  • Placement coordination
  • Planting scope
03

After installation

Watering and establishment guidance should be agreed for the specific project. No survival guarantee is implied unless written into the quotation.

  • Initial care instructions
  • Clear responsibility split
  • Written terms
